## 安装 / Install

在 Foundry → **附加模块 → 安装模块** 中粘贴以下 manifest URL：

```
https://github.com/takaqiao/sf2e_compendium_cn/releases/latest/download/module.json
```

## 依赖 / Requires

- Foundry VTT v13+
- Starfinder Second Edition (`sf2e`) 系统
- [Babele](https://foundryvtt.com/packages/babele)

## 变更 / Changes

详细变更请见本次发布对应的提交记录。
See the commits associated with this tag for the full change list.
